title: Vant-Lynx Animation Fix - Use CSS/Transition Instead of element.animate()
description: CORRECTION: Lynx DOES support CSS transitions, CSS animations, and Vue <Transition>. We made a mistake using element.animate() when we should reuse Vant's original CSS-based animations. This round fixes each component to use Vue <Transition> + CSS transitions like the original Vant implementation.

context.mistake: We incorrectly used main-thread element.animate() when Lynx already supports CSS transitions and Vue <Transition>
context.correction: Use Vue <Transition> component with CSS transition/animation classes, matching Vant's original implementation
context.vantPattern: Vant uses Vue <Transition> with CSS classes: van-fade, van-popup-slide-top/bottom/left/right, van-dialog-bounce
context.cssSupport: Lynx supports: CSS transition property, CSS @keyframes animation, CSS transform, opacity transitions
context.transitionComponent: vue-lynx exports <Transition> from 'vue-lynx' - use it with name prop and CSS classes

userStories.title: Remove useAnimate composable
userStories.description: Delete the useAnimate composable since we'll use CSS transitions instead.
requirements: This file uses main-thread worklets which are unnecessary
Components will be updated in subsequent stories
userStories.testCommand: echo 'Will be tested after component updates'

userStories.title: Overlay: use CSS fade transition
userStories.description: Replace element.animate() with Vue <Transition> and CSS opacity transition.
requirements: Add CSS transition styles: opacity transition with duration prop
Use v-show instead of manual visibility control
Match Vant's van-fade animation (opacity 0->1, ease-out enter, ease-in leave)

userStories.title: Popup: use CSS slide/zoom transitions
userStories.description: Replace element.animate() with Vue <Transition> and position-based CSS transitions.
requirements: Remove useAnimate import and all animate calls
Use <Transition :name='transitionName'> where transitionName depends on position
Add transition styles using :style binding with transitionDuration
Use @after-enter and @after-leave for opened/closed events instead of setTimeout

userStories.title: Dialog: use CSS bounce transition
userStories.description: Ensure Dialog uses Popup's transition (inherits from Popup center position).
requirements: Remove any useAnimate import if present
Dialog wraps Popup - ensure position='center' gets bounce/zoom animation

userStories.title: Toast: use CSS fade transition
userStories.description: Replace element.animate() with CSS fade transition.
requirements: Respect duration prop for animation timing

userStories.title: Notify: use CSS slide transition
userStories.description: Replace element.animate() with CSS slide transition.

userStories.title: DropdownItem: use CSS slide transition
userStories.description: Replace element.animate() with CSS transition for dropdown menu.
requirements: Transform origin top for natural dropdown feel

userStories.title: ImagePreview: use CSS fade transition
userStories.description: Replace element.animate() with CSS fade for image preview overlay.

userStories.title: ActionSheet: verify slide-up transition
userStories.description: Ensure ActionSheet uses Popup's slide-bottom transition.
requirements: Verify it inherits slide-up transition from Popup fix

userStories.title: ShareSheet: verify slide-up transition
userStories.description: Ensure ShareSheet uses Popup's slide-bottom transition.
requirements: Verify it inherits slide-up transition from Popup fix

userStories.title: FloatingPanel: use CSS transition for height
userStories.description: Use CSS transition for panel height changes instead of element.animate().
requirements: Use CSS transition: height 0.3s ease on the panel
Keep drag handling but use CSS for snap animation

userStories.title: FloatingBubble: use CSS transition for position
userStories.description: Use CSS transition for bubble snap position instead of element.animate().
requirements: Use CSS transition: left 0.3s ease, top 0.3s ease
Add scale transition for appear if desired

userStories.title: SwipeCell: use CSS transition for snap
userStories.description: Use CSS transition for cell snap position instead of element.animate().
requirements: Use CSS transition: transform 0.3s ease on wrapper
Apply transition only when snapping, not during drag

userStories.title: NoticeBar: use CSS animation for marquee
userStories.description: Use CSS @keyframes animation for scrolling text instead of element.animate().
requirements: Calculate duration from text length and speed prop

userStories.title: Final cleanup and build verification
userStories.description: Remove useAnimate.ts, verify all builds pass, update animation report.
requirements: Update docs/animation-comparison.md to reflect CSS-based approach
userStories.testCommand: pnpm build && cd examples/vant-lynx && pnpm build
